qualifiedFlows.summary: Operator B can import operator A evidence and preserve upstream lineage across a multi-hop federated issuance path.
Governed reconciliation review remains explicit and local rather than being silently rewritten by imported evidence.
Visibility across operators does not imply local trust or economic activation; adversarial paths remain fail-closed.

constraints: This matrix proves bounded federated flows, not ecosystem-wide operator dependence.
Local operator authority remains required for trust activation and economic effect.
The proof package is reproducible but still repo-local qualification evidence.
